parsed.explanation: I fixed malformed XML and obvious encoding/tag issues while preserving historical spelling and structure as much as possible. Main fixes: (1) corrected one mismatched closing tag </PRICE> to </PRIZE>; (2) escaped '&' as '&' in 'Homen Hias & Odyfl.'; (3) repaired recurring mojibake characters in text (e.g., Bücher, Stöhelins, Eydgnöschafft, ß, and dagger '†'); (4) normalized corrupted format strings like '4t√≤' and '8v√≤' to '4to.' and '8vo.' where clearly intended; (5) retained existing bibliographic tags and did not invent uncertain metadata; (6) kept punctuation/content otherwise intact.
